quote: Thought is so cunning, so clever, that it distorts everything for its own convenience. – Jiddu Krishnamurti
fact: Elwood Edwards did the voice for the AOL sound files (i.e. “You’ve got Mail!”).
joke: Why do we tell actors to “break a leg?” Because every play has a cast.
